title: T-031 — Reservation create service (RM root only)
prompt:
# T-031 — Reservation create service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §9.4 (FR-WH-016), V-WH-FEFO-005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`reserveLp(lpId, woId, woMaterialId, qty)` Server Action that creates a hard-lock lp_reservations row only when the wo_material is RM root (material_source='stock').

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-create.ts`. Validate item_type_snapshot != 'intermediate' AND wo_materials.material_source='stock'. Insert lp_reservations(reservation_type='hard_lock'); update LP.reserved_for_wo_id, LP.reserved_qty (+= qty), LP.status → 'reserved' if qty == LP.qty else stays 'available' partial. Concurrent conflict (partial-unique violation) returns 409 with conflicting WO info.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/reservation-create.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/reservation-create.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an RM-root wo_material, when reserveLp runs with qty=full LP qty, then a lp_reservations row exists and LP.status='reserved'.
2. Given material_source='upstream_wo_output', when reserveLp runs, then it returns V-WH-FEFO-005 validation error and creates no row.
3. Given a partial reservation (qty < LP.qty), when reserveLp runs, then LP.status remains 'available' and reserved_qty increments by qty.
4. Given a parallel reservation attempt on the same active row, when it commits, then it returns 409 with conflicting WO info.

## Test strategy
- RED: reservation-create.test.ts covers four scenarios using two-tx fixture.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test reservation-create`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow reservations on intermediate LPs.
- Do not skip partial-unique conflict handling.
- Do not bypass single-transaction guarantee.

pipeline_inputs.description: Hard-lock reservation create for RM-root wo_materials per Q6 revised scope.
pipeline_inputs.details: Block intermediate LPs; partial reservation supported; concurrent conflict 409. Single transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Given an RM-root wo_material and reserveLp with qty=LP.qty, when run, then lp_reservations row exists and LP.status='reserved'
Given material_source='upstream_wo_output', when run, then V-WH-FEFO-005 error returns
Given partial reservation qty<LP.qty, when run, then LP.status stays 'available' and reserved_qty increments
Given a parallel reservation on the same active row, when it commits, then 409 returns with conflicting WO info
test_strategy: RED: reservation-create.test.ts covers four scenarios with two-tx conflict fixture
